features: PACKED WITH SOOTHING MENTHOL & EUCALYPTOL: This unique blend is designed to help you breathe easy, especially during Autumn and Winter. A few drops in your bath can transform a simple soak into a therapeutic. experience, allowing you to relax and enjoy a soothing steam bath.

COMPACT & TRAVEL FRIENDLY: Nuage Vapour Oil is small enough to slip into your bag or pocket, making it the perfect travel companion. Whether you’re on a weekend getaway or just heading to work, this vapour inhaler. ensures you have quick access to relief from stress whenever needed.

VARIOUS USES: Use Nuage Vapour Oil in baths, as a massage oil, or in oil burners. It’s incredibly easy to incorporate into your routine, whether you’re pampering yourself after a long day or creating a calming environment at home

EASY BREATHING MADE SIMPLE: Breathe easy and restore your sense of well-being by adding a few drops of this vapour oil to a bowl of hot water for an instant inhalation experience. It’s perfect for easing stress, making it a great choice for those who suffer from stressful jobs or family life

PERFECT FOR A SOOTHING BATH EXPERIENCE: Add 4-6 drops to your running bath water to create a spa-like experience at home. The calming vapours will surround you, allowing you to soak away stress while the steam promotes clear airways.
description: Product Description Discover the magic of Nuage Vapour Oil, a blend of soothing menthol and eucalyptol. This compact and travel-friendly vapour inhaler is perfect for those cold winter months. Imagine enjoying a soothing bath after a long day, where just a few drops of this oil transform your bath into a serene sanctuary. As the warm water envelops you, the calming aroma fills the air, helping to restore your sense of well-being. Whether at home or on the go, Nuage Vapour Oil is your trusty companion for self-care. Simply add a few drops to a massage oil for a soothing rubdown that targets tension and helps you to de-stress. Use it in an oil burner to infuse your living space with a comforting fragrance, making every room feel like a wellness retreat. For those chilly evenings, this oil is a must-have in your arsenal. Embrace a world of relaxation and relief with Nuage Vapour Oil, the essential addition to your self-care routine. Let the soothing properties of menthol and eucalyptol guide you to a state of calm and comfort. Perfect for any time of year, this oil is a must-have for anyone seeking natural relief from the everyday stressors of life. Ingredients Ylang Ylang Oil (Cananga odorata) Directions Add 4-6 drops in running bath water to dilute, soak for at least 20 minutes, breathe deeply and relax. Add 5 drops to a suitable massage carrier oil to dilute, massage into the neck, back and/or chest, relax and breathe. Place water in a burner, add 5 drops, place tea light in the oil burner and gently infuse into any room in your home with a soothing fragrance. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. Keep out of reach of children and pets. See more
